info.name: yt-dlp Downloader
info.summary: Download videos and audio using yt-dlp
info.description:
A Nextcloud app that provides a web UI for yt-dlp, allowing you to download videos (MP4) and audio (MP3) directly to your Nextcloud storage.
## Features - Download videos as MP4 - Extract audio as MP3 - Choose the destination folder in your Nextcloud storage - Background download jobs with status tracking
## Requirements - `yt-dlp` must be installed on the Nextcloud server and available in the system PATH - `ffmpeg` is recommended for format conversion (especially for MP3)
info.author: taiseiue
